assertions: Review identifies the N+1 query pattern as a performance issue with high or critical severity
Review explains that the nested loops cause multiplicative database queries (e.g., for N orders with M items each, this runs 1 + N + N*M + N queries)
Review suggests using JOINs or batch queries as a fix for the N+1 pattern
Review identifies missing error handling (no try-catch around async database operations)
Review identifies missing input validation on req.params.userId
Each finding includes a severity level (critical, high, medium, low, or info)
Each finding includes a specific fix suggestion showing code or approach
Review includes a summary section with overall assessment
